name: Contracts
description: One row per contract document for a Client. fieldMapJson holds the mapped application/client fields used to populate the template. PDF generation (GenerateContract) is STUBBED until UCF delivers the 4 templates; status stays pending-template and pdfUrl null until then. Internal/staff.

columns.name: createdAt
columns.description: Item created at. ISO 8601 datetime string, format: YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS, e.g. 2025-09-30T18:45:00Z, 2025-09-30T18:45:00+05:30

columns.name: updatedAt
columns.description: Item updated at. ISO 8601 datetime string, format: YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS, e.g. 2025-09-30T18:45:00Z, 2025-09-30T18:45:00+05:30

columns.name: templateKey
columns.description: Identifier of the template used (gated on UCF templates)

columns.name: pdfUrl
columns.description: URL of the generated PDF (null until templates are wired)

columns.name: fieldMapJson
columns.description: Mapped application/client fields used to fill the template

columns.name: generatedAt
columns.description: When the contract was generated. ISO 8601 datetime string, format: YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS, e.g. 2025-09-30T18:45:00Z, 2025-09-30T18:45:00+05:30.
